caption: The video depicts a medical simulation session taking place in a clinical setting, likely during "Sim Week." Two individuals dressed in blue surgical gowns and masks are engaged in a procedure involving medical instruments on a table covered with various tools and supplies. One person is holding a syringe and appears to be preparing or demonstrating an injection technique, while the other observes closely, possibly providing guidance or feedback. The environment includes a mannequin in the background, suggesting that this is a training exercise aimed at honing practical skills in a controlled environment. The scene is well-lit, emphasizing the focus on precision and teamwork in a healthcare context.
